message.content:
STEP 1 COMPLETE — Rules locked.
Key constraints: Primary 2-3, Secondary 2-3, Tertiary max 4.
Options: max 10 per spec, under 25 chars.
Banned: Other, Custom, N/A, Unbranded, As Required.
Output: single JSON, no markdown fences.

STEP 2 COMPLETE — Wiki fully read.

Section 9 Demand Signals (ranked):
1. Hex Head Screw with EPDM Washer → PRIMARY (Head Type + Washer)
2. CSK Head Screw (Phillips Drive) → PRIMARY (Head Type + Drive Type)
3. Truss Head Screw (Phillips Drive) → PRIMARY (Head Type + Drive Type)
4. Stainless Steel (SS 304/410) variants → SECONDARY (Material)
5. Bulk MS Screws (Mixed Sizes) → PRIMARY (Diameter/Length)

Section 10 confirms buyers first ask:
- "Is this Indian-made or imported?" (Origin)
- "Price per kg for loose screws?" (Pricing/Material)
- "Do you have both MS and SS?" (Material)

Option values extracted from Section 3:
- Head Type: Hex, Pan, Countersunk (CSK), Wafer, Truss, Flange, Bugle
- Material: Carbon Steel (C1022), SS 304, SS 410, SS 550
- Diameter: 3.5mm (#6), 3.9mm (#7), 4.2mm (#8), 4.8mm (#10), 5.5mm (#12), 6.3mm (#14)
- Length: 13 mm, 19 mm, 25 mm, 32 mm, 38 mm, 50 mm, 75 mm, 100 mm

Price drivers from Section 5: Material, Coating, Brand, Origin.
Certifications/use cases from Section 6/7: DIN 7504, IS 1367, PEB, Roofing, Solar.
Brand decision from Section 4: Include (Tier 1 & 2 brands listed, brand is a price driver).

Dimension rule: Applicable YES. Section 9 and 10 show buyers ask for specific sizes (Diameter and Length) as primary criteria.

STEP 3 COMPLETE.
Primary: Head Type, Diameter, Length | Secondary: Material, Coating | Tertiary: Brand, Drive Type, Washer, Origin
Counts valid? Primary [3/3] Secondary [2/3] Tertiary [4/4]

STEP 4 — Audit...

TIERS
[PASS] Primary = Section 9 top demand signals (Head, Diameter, Length)
[PASS] Secondary = price drivers (Material, Coating)
[PASS] Tertiary = brand, drive, washer, origin
[PASS] No spec in more than one tier
[PASS] Single-value specs: None

SPEC NAMES
[PASS] All names from Section 9 or 10
[PASS] Title Case, stopwords lowercase
[PASS] No duplicates, all 1–3 words

BRAND
[PASS] Section 4 read, brand is a price driver in Section 5, included in Tertiary.

DIMENSIONS
[PASS] Diameter and Length are separate variable specs as per Section 3.1 and 9.

OPTIONS
[PASS] Under 25 chars
[PASS] Correct symbols (– used for ranges if any, though discrete preferred)
[PASS] Max 10 per spec, ordered by buyer frequency (Roofing/Hex first)

HALLUCINATION
[PASS] Every spec name and option traceable to wiki

Overall: [ALL PASS → output]

STEP 5 — Final Output

{
  "category_name": "Self Drilling Screw",
  "finalized_specs": {
    "finalized_primary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Head Type",
          "options": [
            "Hex Head",
            "Countersunk (CSK) Head",
            "Truss Head",
            "Pan Head",
            "Flange Head",
            "Wafer Head",
            "Bugle Head"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Diameter",
          "options": [
            "5.5 mm (#12)",
            "4.2 mm (#8)",
            "4.8 mm (#10)",
            "6.3 mm (#14)",
            "3.9 mm (#7)",
            "3.5 mm (#6)"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Length",
          "options": [
            "25 mm (1 inch)",
            "19 mm (3/4 inch)",
            "13 mm (1/2 inch)",
            "38 mm (1.5 inch)",
            "50 mm (2 inch)",
            "75 mm (3 inch)",
            "100 mm (4 inch)",
            "55 mm",
            "150 mm"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_secondary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Material",
          "options": [
            "Carbon Steel (C1022)",
            "SS 304",
            "SS 410",
            "SS 550",
            "Mild Steel (MS)"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Coating",
          "options": [
            "Zinc Plated",
            "Dacromate Coated",
            "Phosphated",
            "Electropolyseal",
            "Anti-Rust Coating"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_tertiary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Brand",
          "options": [
            "HP",
            "Unbrako",
            "TVS",
            "Super Screws",
            "LPS Bossard",
            "Kundan Fasteners",
            "SLG Fasteners",
            "INOX",
            "Stonex Screws",
            "BDN Fasteners"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Drive Type",
          "options": [
            "Phillips (PH)",
            "Hex",
            "Torx",
            "Slotted"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Washer",
          "options": [
            "EPDM Washer",
            "Bonded Steel Washer",
            "Without Washer"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Origin",
          "options": [
            "Domestic (Made in India)",
            "Imported"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
